Resistance Calculator - Dual Function

Calculate resistance from color code OR color code from resistance value - Two-way calculator

Enter Resistance Value

Ω (Ohms)
kΩ (kilo-ohms)
MΩ (mega-ohms)
±1% (Brown)
±2% (Red)
±5% (Gold)
±10% (Silver)
Want to calculate value from colors?

Select Color Bands

1st Digit
2nd Digit
Multiplier
Tolerance
Want to calculate colors from value?

How to Use

  • Value → Color mode: Enter resistance value, select unit and tolerance, then click "Calculate Color Code"
  • Color → Value mode: Select colors for each band from dropdowns, then click "Calculate Resistance Value"
  • Results will show both the resistance value with tolerance and the visual resistor with color bands
